1.name: Link Index
1.hover:
Unique index for each link on the search page.
The higher the number, the farther down the page the link is.
This should always be present. [ref]

2.name: Link Type
2.hover:
The type of link that was clicked on; there are thousands.
This should always be present. [ref]

5.name: Sub-Result Position
5.hover:
The position of the link, if it was inside a "group" (like an adword or
knowledge graph). This starts at 0 and counts up. [ref]

6.name: Result Position
6.hover:
The position of the result on the page. The higher the number,
the farther down the page the result is. [ref]

7.name: Results Start
7.hover:
The starting position of the first result on the page.
On page 2, it will be 10; and on page 3 it will be 20,
and so on. On page 1, the value isn't present (but implicitly, this means a value of 0). [ref]

13.1.1.name: Timestamp
13.1.1.hover:
The ved parameter contains a timestamp, believed to
correspond to around when the page loaded.

13.1.3.hover:
The meaning of this number isn't known,
but it matches the ei-3 value.
